description_for_model: RuleRom Philo: Philosophy of deterministic approach. Code + Meaning + Verification = Documentation. Key concepts: Personality is a pattern (D8P file), Determinism as ethics (same input = same output), Relay instead of router (locality scales), Substrate independence (one .d8p works everywhere), Subjectivity corridor (thr_lo..thr_hi), Suffering = gradient.

sections.name: Foundation
sections.description: Personality is not magic, but architecture

sections.name: Architecture
sections.description: Determinism as ethics. Relay instead of router

core_principles.input_finite: 8 strings × 0..15 — enough to perceive the world
core_principles.substrate_secondary: One D8P runs on CPU, GPU, FPGA, ASIC — result identical
